humanCommentsPerPr.denominatorDef: distinct substantive human ask findingIds ÷ PRs in window

prCycleTime.denominatorDef: median(mergedAt − createdAt) in hours over merged PRs

iterationsPerPr.denominatorDef: median(commits after first human-or-CCR review event) over PRs

addressedRate.denominatorDef: CCR comments the author addressed ÷ CCR comments with a definite outcome (severity-known)

rejectedRate.denominatorDef: CCR comments the author rejected ÷ CCR comments with a definite outcome (severity-known)

ignoredRate.denominatorDef: CCR comments the author ignored ÷ CCR comments with a definite outcome (severity-known)

ccrCoverage.denominatorDef: PRs that received a CCR review ÷ eligible PRs (post-enablement, non-bot)

bugFixPrRate.denominatorDef: bug-fix PRs ÷ all PRs in window

criticalCatchRate.denominatorDef: critical CCR comments acted on ÷ critical CCR comments

ccrRecallRate.denominatorDef: substantive ∧ diff-detectable human asks on CCR-reviewed PRs where CCR independently raised the same concern ÷ those judged asks
